author: claude
content: VDD post-rebase poll: #1158 merged to master. 6 PRs rebased. CI results: tests(1) flake (test_browser_profile_coverage — transient, passes on master). #1153 has mypy error (from merged #1158 + type annotations). #1161 ALL tests timeout at 30m (SQLAlchemy causing hang). Fix agents running for both. PRs #1154, #1155, #1156, #1157 are CI-clean except transient flakes.
